name: lookup_patient
description: Look up patient records by phone and/or full name. ALWAYS call this when a caller phone may map to multiple people (family shared line). Never assume identity when match_count > 1 or requires_disambiguation is true — ask for the caller's full name and call again with both phone and full_name.
execution_message_description: Brief holding phrase while looking up the patient, matched to the caller's language (English or Hindi).

phone.description: Caller phone in E.164 or clinic format. Prefer the inbound from_number when available.

full_name.description: Caller full name used to disambiguate shared phone numbers.
